user.title: Rain Warner Setup
user.description: Configure your rain radar monitoring location. Coordinates default to your Home Assistant home location.

data_description.radius: Area around your location to monitor for precipitation (1-50 km)
data_description.data_source: DWD Radar provides highest precision for Germany. Bright Sky is easier but slightly less accurate.

error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Latitude must be between -90 and 90, longitude between -180 and 180.
